message:
feat(wasm): add browser-core release artifacts and fix wasm-opt bulk-memory validation

Browser core crate gains wasm-pack release profile configuration that enables
bulk-memory instructions in wasm-opt, which the runtime already uses but
wasm-opt was rejecting during the optimization pass. The profile applies:
-Oz --enable-bulk-memory --strip-dwarf --strip-producers --vacuum

abi_fingerprint() changed from const fn to regular fn — const evaluation
of the fingerprint computation was hitting compile-time evaluation limits
in some toolchain configurations.

Build script (build_browser_core_artifacts.sh) updated to handle Rust
integer literal underscores in ABI version/fingerprint extraction by
stripping them with tr -d '_'.

New tracked artifacts in packages/browser-core/:
- asupersync.js: JS bindings
- asupersync.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations
- asupersync_bg.wasm: optimized WASM binary (266KB)
- asupersync_bg.wasm.d.ts: WASM binding type declarations
- abi-metadata.json: ABI version and fingerprint
- debug-metadata.json: build debug metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,6 +55,11 @@ dev = ["asupersync/wasm-browser-dev"]
 prod = ["asupersync/wasm-browser-prod"]
 deterministic = ["asupersync/wasm-browser-deterministic"]
 
+[package.metadata.wasm-pack.profile.release]
+# Browser-core release artifacts use bulk-memory instructions; wasm-opt must
+# validate them instead of rejecting the optimized packaging pass.
+wasm-opt = ["-Oz", "--enable-bulk-memory", "--strip-dwarf", "--strip-producers", "--vacuum"]
+
 [lints.rust]
 unsafe_code = "deny"

@@ -53,9 +53,9 @@ wasm-pack build "${CRATE_DIR}" \
   --out-name asupersync \
   "${BUILD_ARGS[@]}"
 
-major="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_MAJOR_VERSION[^=]*= ([0-9]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1)"
-minor="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_MINOR_VERSION[^=]*= ([0-9]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1)"
-fingerprint="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_SIGNATURE_FINGERPRINT_V1[^=]*= ([0-9]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1)"
+major="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_MAJOR_VERSION[^=]*= ([0-9_]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1 | tr -d '_')"
+minor="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_MINOR_VERSION[^=]*= ([0-9_]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1 | tr -d '_')"
+fingerprint="$(rg -No 'WASM_ABI_SIGNATURE_FINGERPRINT_V1[^=]*= ([0-9_]+);' "${ABI_FILE}" -r '$1' -m1 | tr -d '_')"
 
 cat > "${STAGING_DIR}/abi-metadata.json" <<EOF
 {
